notes: The same running frontend dev server was exercised through localhost because the app is configured to call http://localhost:4000 and the current backend CORS allowlist accepts localhost, not 127.0.0.1:5173.
No rebuild or restart was performed.
Execution used the existing local Playwright browser/runtime already present on the machine.

results.title: Host triggers Play Again and returns to lobby for a new run
assertions: The host stayed on the same /host/{ROOM_CODE} route after clicking Play Again.
The room code remained the same.
The host lobby reappeared with Start game visible.
The finished-state Game Over view was dismissed.

results.title: Join via deep link with prefilled room code
assertions: A real room was created first and its generated room code was captured.
Opening /join?code={ROOM_CODE} prefilled the room code input.
Submitting the join form navigated to /play/{ROOM_CODE}.
The player room lobby loaded successfully.
